DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUEVA, ROBERT CUEVA, LOURDES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUEVA, ROBERT CUEVA, LOURDES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUBAN, VIRGINIA N. $15,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $715.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,655.00
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CUEVA, ROBERT CUEVA, LOURDES
